page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr8i.4xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing an Intel Xeon 6462C processor running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 16 vCPUs maps to a dedicated physical core, ensuring consistent compute performance without resource sharing at the thread level.

The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. This memory-heavy configuration is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning storage requirements must be met through external network-attached block storage.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density, this instance is designed for workloads requiring significant memory capacity and predictable compute performance. It is well-suited for memory-intensive applications, database hosting, and enterprise workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr8i.4xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 6462C processor running at 3.3 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture with a KVM hypervisor, it provides a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, ensuring dedicated compute resources for each vCPU. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, offering a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core, alongside a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. It contains no local storage or onboard GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for memory-intensive enterprise applications, database workloads, and caching layers that benefit from dedicated CPU allocation and high memory capacity without the need for local disk resources.
